top3.sql:
SELECT r.raceId, r.name AS raceName, r.year, r.date, r.time, c.name AS circuitName, c.location, c.country
FROM races r
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
WHERE c.name = 'Silverstone';

SELECT r.raceId, r.year, r.round, r.name, r.date, r.time, c.name AS circuitName, c.location, c.country
FROM races r
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
WHERE c.name = 'Silverstone';

SELECT r.raceId, r.name AS raceName, r.year, r.date, r.time, c.name AS circuitName, c.location, c.country
FROM races r
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
WHERE c.name = 'Silverstone';

SELECT r.raceId, r.name AS raceName, r.year, r.round, r.date, r.time, c.location, c.country, c.url AS circuitUrl
FROM races r
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
WHERE c.name = 'Silverstone'
ORDER BY r.year, r.round;

SELECT r.raceId, r.year, r.round, r.name AS raceName, r.date, r.time, c.name AS circuitName, c.location, c.country, c.url AS circuitUrl
FROM races r
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
WHERE c.name = 'Silverstone';

SELECT r.raceId, r.name AS raceName, r.year, r.date, r.time, c.name AS circuitName, c.location, c.country
FROM races r
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
WHERE c.name = 'Silverstone';

SELECT r.raceId, r.name AS raceName, r.year, r.round, r.date, r.time, c.location, c.country, c.url AS circuitUrl
FROM races r
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
WHERE c.name = 'Silverstone'
ORDER BY r.year, r.round;

SELECT r.raceId, r.name AS raceName, r.year, r.round, r.date, r.time, c.location, c.country, c.lat, c.lng, c.alt, c.url AS circuitUrl
FROM races r
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
WHERE c.name = 'Silverstone'
ORDER BY r.year DESC, r.round;

final.sql:
SELECT r.raceId, r.name AS raceName, r.year, r.date, r.time, c.name AS circuitName, c.location, c.country
FROM races r
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
WHERE c.name = 'Silverstone';
